response.justification: Bogdan brings 17 years of broad engineering experience and some early AI-adjacent work (MCP tooling, agentic frameworks), but the role demands a director-level individual contributor with recognized AI expertise, a demonstrated track record of building AI platforms at scale, and the strategic advisory credibility to influence large customers and internal leadership. His AI exposure is recent (roughly one year), his seniority sits at Staff/Senior rather than Principal/Director, and there is no evidence of the thought-leadership, cloud-platform depth, or customer-facing strategic influence the role centers on.
strengths: 17 years of hands-on engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — meets the raw tenure floor
Current AI-agent and MCP tooling work at re:cinq shows a genuine on-ramp into agentic AI development
Track record of community knowledge-sharing through workshops, conference talks, and open-source projects
concerns: AI expertise is shallow and very recent — no demonstrated AI products or platforms built and shipped at meaningful scale
No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in AI or a related field; educational background does not compensate for the AI depth gap
Seniority and scope fall short of the director-level IC profile — limited evidence of strategic advisory, executive influence, or customer-facing thought leadership

key_factors.factor: Broad engineering tenure and emerging AI work
